common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this call to get items list of certain shop_category

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: The information you queried is not found.

error_list.name: error_service
error_list.description: The shop category id is not found.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: Syntax error. Please check the format of your Request Parameter.

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: partner_id is invalid

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: The App is deleted, and you'll be unable to make any API call.

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: App developer’s permissions for authorizations have been restricted. If you’re a seller, contact the developer for more information. If you’re the developer, refer to the Open Platform Console for details.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: There is no partner_id in query.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Invalid partner_id.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: no timestamp

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Invalid timestamp

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: There is no sign in query.

common_error_list.name: error_sign
common_error_list.description: Wrong sign.

common_error_list.name: invalid_partner_id
common_error_list.description: Invalid partner_id, please have a check.

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: No permission to current api.

common_error_list.name: error_api_call_restricted
common_error_list.description: The App permission for api call have been restricted. If you’re a seller, contact the developer for more information. If you’re the developer, refer to the Open Platform Console for details.

common_error_list.name: api_suspended
common_error_list.description: The API is offline. Please call v2 API instead.

common_error_list.name: error_limit
common_error_list.description: The total API call number made by your APP has reached the daily API call limit, please try again after 00: 00 (UTC+08:00)

common_error_list.name: error_rate_limit
common_error_list.description: Too many requests. You have reached the rate limit. Please try again later.

common_error_list.name: source_ip_undeclared
common_error_list.description: Request Source IP ({ip}) is undeclared. Please declare all your IP addresses in the Shopee Open Platform Console > App list > IP Address Whitelist

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Permission denied. This API is currently offline or the request path is incorrect.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Partner_id is invalid, should be an integer between 0 and 4294967295.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: no timestamp.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Timestamp is invalid, should be an integer between 0 and 4294967295.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Timestamp is expired.

common_error_list.name: error_partner_key_expired
common_error_list.description: Your API partner key has expired, please reset the Live API Partner Key in Console to get a new valid partner key to call open api.

common_error_list.name: error_api_permission
common_error_list.description: This app type has no permission to this API.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: There is no access_token in query.

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: Invalid access_token.

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: Invalid partner_id or shopid.

common_error_list.name: shop_no_linked
common_error_list.description: Partner and shop has no linked.

common_error_list.name: shop_banned
common_error_list.description: The shop account has been banned. Permissions for shop authorization and API calls have been suspended until the shop account is restored.

common_error_list.name: invalid_acceess_token
common_error_list.description: Invalid access_token, please have a check.

common_error_list.name: partner_shop_no_link
common_error_list.description: Invalid partner_id or shop_id, please have a check.

common_error_list.name: error_ashop_api_permission
common_error_list.description: The shop is Affiliate shop has no permission to call this API.

common_error_list.name: error_kyc_auth
common_error_list.description: No permission. Please inform the seller to complete the Seller Registration on Shopee Seller Center first, then this shop can call for this API.

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: System error, please try again later.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: There is no shop_id in query.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: shop_id is invalid, should be an integer between 0 and 4294967295.

request_params.name: page_size
request_params.description: Specifies the starting entry of data to return in the current call. Default is 1000. The input range of page_size is [0, 1000]

request_params.name: page_no
request_params.description: If many items are available to retrieve, you may need to call this api multiple times to retrieve all the data. And the default will be 0. page_size*page_no should be [0, 2147483446].

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier of the API request for error tracking

children.name: item_list
children.description: A list of Shopee's unique identifiers for items.

children.name: total_count
children.description: This is to indicate the whole number of items under the shop category.

children.name: more
children.description: This is to indicate whether the item list is more than one page. If this value is true, you may want to continue to check next page to retrieve the rest of items.

update_log_list.content: Optimize the Sample information of Request Parameter and Response Parameter
